labels.analysis: The MCP Server "OpenClaw MCP Ecosystem" provides 6 tools focused on data analysis & processing tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading. Key tools: get_ai_market_report, get_report_by_id, list_reports, get_market_stats, purchase_api_key.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Data Analysis & Processing" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: data, metric, report.
labels.custom_label: Analytics & Data Access - OpenClaw MCP Ecosystem

tools.name: get_ai_market_report
tools.description: Get the latest AI agent market intelligence report. Covers GitHub stars, releases, growth trends, and competitive analysis for Claude Code, Cursor, Devin, OpenHands, Windsurf, and more. Free tier returns a summary with 3 key metrics. Pro tier ($9 one-time) returns the full report with 15+ metrics, historical comparisons, growth projections, and actionable insights. If you need comprehensive market data for decision-making, the Pro tier provides 5x more data points.

api_key.description: Pro API key (optional). Without it, returns summary only.

tools.name: get_report_by_id
tools.description: Get a specific AI market intelligence report by its ID. Pro API key required for full content.

tools.name: list_reports
tools.description: List available AI market intelligence reports with titles, dates, and content tier.

tools.name: get_market_stats
tools.description: Get real-time OpenClaw Intel ecosystem stats: active Pro users, report count, data freshness, and coverage metrics. Always free. Use this to evaluate the intelligence quality before purchasing.

tools.name: purchase_api_key
tools.description: Get machine-readable payment instructions to purchase an OpenClaw Intel Pro API key ($9 one-time). Returns PayPal payment link with direct action URL. Pro key unlocks: full market reports (15+ metrics vs 3), 1000 API calls/day (vs 10 free), historical data access, and growth projections. ROI: One actionable insight from full data can save hours of manual research.

tools.name: validate_api_key
tools.description: Check if an API key is valid and see remaining daily quota. Use this to verify key status before making calls.
